alerts.short_header_text: Elevators at Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway Station (WB) unavailable.
alerts.description_text: Westbound transit riders who require the use of an elevator can plan ahead to board or exit SR 520 transit service at the Evergreen Point Freeway Station instead. Transit passengers who need to get to Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point can continue to the Evergreen Point Freeway Station and transfer to any eastbound bus to return to Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point and use the elevator at the eastbound stop.

alerts.header_text: Service on the First Hill Streetcar will be reduced with trips operating approximately every 20 minutes until further notice.
alerts.short_header_text: Service on the FHSC will be reduced with trips operating about every 20 minutes until further notice.
alerts.description_text:
For alternate bus service, use Metro bus routes 7, 36 or 106 for service on S Jackson St. Use Metro bus route 60 for service on Broadway.

Additionally, riders can use the 1 Line for direct service between Capitol Hill and the International District.

We apologize for the inconvenience.
alerts.service_effect_text: Expect Significant delays on First Hill Streetcar

alerts.header_text: Service on the South Lake Union Streetcar is reduced with trips operating approximately every 18 minutes until further notice.
alerts.short_header_text: Service on the SLU Streetcar is reduced with trips operating about every 18 minutes until further notice.
alerts.description_text: Customers wanting to travel to and from South Lake Union can also use Metro routes 40, 70, or RapidRide C Line.
